name: kvs-explorer
description: Browser-based explorer and editor for the FiveM KVS (LevelDB) store. Rust → WebAssembly core with a SvelteKit front-end. Everything runs client-side.

scripts.dev: bun run wasm:dev && cd web && bun run dev
scripts.build: bun run wasm && cd web && bun run build
scripts.wasm: wasm-pack build kvs-core --release --target web --out-dir ../web/src/lib/wasm --out-name kvs_core && rm -f web/src/lib/wasm/.gitignore
scripts.wasm:dev: wasm-pack build kvs-core --dev --target web --out-dir ../web/src/lib/wasm --out-name kvs_core && rm -f web/src/lib/wasm/.gitignore
scripts.test: cargo test --manifest-path kvs-core/Cargo.toml && bun run test:wasm
scripts.test:wasm: wasm-pack build kvs-core --dev --target nodejs --out-dir target/wasm-node --out-name kvs_core && bun tools/wasm-smoke.cjs
scripts.fixture: cd tools/gen-fixture && bun install && bun run gen
